steps.title: Look up the southern stoplight loosejaw in the table
steps.content: The question asks at what depth the southern stoplight loosejaw lives. According to the table, this species lives 500–2,000 meters below the ocean surface.

steps.title: Match the depth range to each choice
steps.content:
• "More than 2,000 meters below the surface": the table gives an upper limit of 2,000 meters, not deeper than that. ✗
  • "to 400 meters below the surface": this range does not match the table’s 500–2,000 meters for this species. ✗
  • "to 2,000 meters below the surface": this exactly matches the depth range recorded in the table for the southern stoplight loosejaw. ✓
  • "to 500 meters below the surface": this range does not match the table’s 500–2,000 meters for this species. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
